info.title: Product Service API
info.description: Product microservice avec gestion modulaire des variants (color, size, capacity, weight) et pricing dynamique

tags.name: Variants
tags.description: Gestion des variants de produits (color, size, capacity, weight) avec pricing modulaire

tags.name: Pricing
tags.description: Calcul des prix basé sur les attributs sélectionnés

get.description: Full-text search on products with relevance scoring

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.summary: Get product variants with pricing details

200.description: List of variants with price breakdown

post.summary: Add single variant with modular pricing

400.description: Invalid data or SKU already exists

post.summary: Upload image and create multiple variants with modular pricing
post.description: Upload product image and create color/size/capacity/weight variants in batch. Supports two pricing modes: capacity-based (electronics) or modifier-based (clothing).

colors.description: JSON array of color objects with priceImpact

sizes.description: JSON array of size objects with priceImpact

capacities.description: JSON array of capacity objects with basePrice (for electronics)

weights.description: JSON array of weight objects with priceImpact

basePrice.description: Base price for standard products (if no capacities)

201.description: Image uploaded and variants created with calculated prices

post.summary: Calculate price for selected variant attributes
post.description: Preview final price before purchase based on selected color, size, capacity with modular pricing

400.description: Invalid attributes or combination not available

get.description: Returns all possible variant combinations with their calculated prices. Useful for displaying a comparison grid.

put.description: Override the calculated price for a specific variant (promotion, clearance, etc.)

price.description: Override price (null to revert to calculated)

get.description: Get similar products based on category and tags
Get all products for a specific merchant

post.description: Create a new product for a specific merchant

get.description: Get all products for a specific store

attributes.description: Complete variant attributes with pricing info

size.description: Flat size value from attributes.size.value or attributes.capacity.value

calculated_price.description: Auto-calculated: base + color + size + weight impacts
